title: Kiwi Shader
description: This is a Shader that i specifically made to be fast and have pixel Shadows. It breaks many things like blindness so i dont recommend you use it except you want the same as me.
body:
This is a Shader that i specifically made to be fast and have pixel Shadows. It breaks many things like blindness so i dont recommend you use it except you want the same as me.

It also has reflections and pbr support.
